action.reasoning: Observation: MLP baseline achieved MSE=1.039 (val_loss~1.27 after 3 epochs), with train loss dropping faster indicating overfitting; DLinear strong on ETTh1 long-horizon. Analysis: Linear decomposition (trend/seasonal) adds time-series bias, reduces params/overfitting vs MLP; more epochs (10), adjusted strides (~2600 train samples), weight_decay, per-epoch metrics logging will improve score significantly while fitting time budget (~15-20min est. from prior 216s). Decision: Update model.py to DLinear, revise train.py (epochs=10, stride=3/6, no per-epoch stdout, AdamW), keep predict.py; run training then submit_eval on best.pt for new baseline.
